channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description:
Window layout polish.

  • The window's sidebar is now fixed and always visible; it can no longer be dragged off the screen or collapsed.
  • The History list opens on your most recent recording instead of an empty pane.
  • Long transcripts are shown in a centered, readable column instead of stretching across a maximized window.
  • The title bar stays consistent across every tab, so switching tabs no longer makes things jump around.
  • Per-recording actions (copy, reveal, delete) now have a fixed place in the view instead of resizing the title bar.
